candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label at the top of the income statement; preferred over product/component revenue lines.
Revenue component, but not full top-line because other operating revenues also exist.
Direct top-line revenue synonym and matches total operating revenue values.
Specific ancillary income, not the main total revenue line.

Non-operating finance item, not revenue.

candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to owners, not revenue.

Balance sheet liability item, not reported period revenue.

variables.notes: Using the two semantically correct top-line total revenue labels as a priority list; later code can take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Exact direct cost line matching COGS.

Operating overhead bucket; acceptable SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.

Broad finance expense subtotal; less preferred than granular recurring components because it may include FX and other items.

Broad finance subtotal and unpopulated in preview; less preferred than granular components.
Not a finance cost line.

candidates.row_label: Share of results of equity-accounted investments

Asset line, not equity.

Equity component only, not total book equity.
Direct total equity line and best available balance-sheet equity measure.
Total equity including minority interest; less preferred because BE should exclude MIB when possible.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation item, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Income statement row, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.
Correct balance-sheet label for non-controlling interests, but per equity rule MIB should be left empty when BE uses TOTAL EQUITY and no separate owners' equity line exists.
Combined total, not minority interest alone.

variables.notes: Left empty because BE is mapped to TOTAL EQUITY and no separate parent/owners' equity line is available; this avoids double counting non-controlling interests.
